validators.name: isolated Codex CLI complete Sprint review
validators.summary: No discrete actionable issue remained after complete review of worker supervision, contracts, fenced attempt persistence, receipt verification, tests, and documentation.

validators.name: CodeRabbit pull request status context
validators.summary: The required status completed successfully, but the service explicitly reported that no substantive review ran because of a temporary review limit. It is not counted as independent validation.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit after this non-authoritative package is published to main.

themes: process-tree cleanup, event deadlines, and bounded output accounting
environment sanitization and Codex shell-policy defense in depth
write-scope symlink races, hidden Git state, and ignored-file mutation
exact report-to-worktree equality and content-addressed evidence
fenced attempt lifecycle, idempotent recovery, and receipt verification
terminal quarantine for failed dirty worktrees
preservation of validated blocked partial work without weakening quarantine

acceptance.criterion: worker cancellation leaves no process in the launched process group
wall and inactivity timeouts produce stable retryable classifications
a restarted supervisor reconciles abandoned attempts before reuse
worker authority is bounded by scopes, budgets, contracts, and fenced persistence
invalid, unreported, or failed mutations cannot become successful work

signals: structured starting, started, output, and finished events exclude raw process output
canonical results carry stable status, reason, exit code, duration, usage, and hashes
attempt lifecycle events and receipts preserve correlation, causation, lease owner, and fencing token
timeouts, cancellation, invalid reports, budget rejection, and contamination are distinct classifications
